system.flavor: Your deft hands make quick work of multiple foes.
system.effect:
Mark [X]: Mark your foe. While your foe is marked, they take 2 damage once or (5+) twice after you attack any other foe, ignoring cover. If your marked foe is defeated, you may transfer this mark to a new foe in range as a quick ability on your turn. This mark is only removed when a foe is defeated or when it is moved.
Precision damage to 1d3+1. If at range 7+, increase damage to 1d3+3
